message:
e2e: Stub AI summary generation and fix test user role

- Add isTestEnvironment() check in summarizer to return stub value
  when VITE_USE_TEST_DB is set, avoiding real API calls in tests
- Set role:

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/c9281926-48e4-493a-aba8-421f9e6150e5"user" on test user seed data so they can access /app
  instead of being redirected to waitlist
